description: Create a Porter's Value Chain Analysis diagram for 'EcoTech Electronics' titled 'EcoTech Electronics Value Chain Analysis'. Populate the Support Activities with the following: Firm Infrastructure: 'Cloud-based ERP, Leed Certified HQ'; Human Resource Management: 'Remote-first policy, STEM recruiting'; Technology Development: 'AI R&D Lab, IoT Patent Portfolio'; and Procurement: 'Sustainable silicon sourcing, Global vendor portal'. Populate the Primary Activities with: Inbound Logistics: 'JIT Component Delivery'; Operations: 'Robotic Assembly, Quality Control'; Outbound Logistics: 'Global Distribution Centers'; Marketing & Sales: 'Direct-to-Consumer Website'; and Service: '24/7 Chatbot Support'. Save the project file to /home/ga/Documents/ecotech_value_chain.eddx and export the diagram as an image to /home/ga/Documents/ecotech_value_chain.png.
